Improve Docker container restart safety with rollback capability (#13)

* Only remove old container after new one starts successfully

Reorder the restart helper script so the old container is preserved
when the new container fails to start, allowing log inspection.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01EbC5S4x2YUJtmXNsZ3fu2M

* Keep helper container on failure, self-remove on success

Change AutoRemove to false so the helper container's logs can be
inspected if the restart fails. On success, the helper fires a
force-delete against itself as its final action.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01EbC5S4x2YUJtmXNsZ3fu2M

* Rename SELF_ID to SELF_NAME for clarity

https://claude.ai/code/session_01EbC5S4x2YUJtmXNsZ3fu2M

commit.message:
fix(agents): remove AskUserQuestion from tools: frontmatter (v8.4.3)

Fixes TRIGGER 1 of Claude Code bug #29674 (regression v2.1.63+).

Root cause: when AskUserQuestion is listed in an agent's allowed-tools
(tools: frontmatter), the permission evaluator early-returns {allow}
bypassing requiresUserInteraction() guard. The tool resolves in ~100ms
with an empty string, never showing the question UI.

Fix: Remove AskUserQuestion from tools: frontmatter in all 7 agents.
Per GitHub #30363 workaround: "leave field empty or omit it — question
renders correctly." The tool remains callable by foreground sub-agents
(passed through to user per official Claude Code docs).

Affected agents:
- planner.md
- bug-investigator.md
- component-builder.md
- web-researcher.md
- silent-failure-hunter.md
- code-reviewer.md
- integration-verifier.md

Note: TRIGGER 2 (router's own AskUserQuestion in same turn as Skill
load) remains unfixed — this is a Claude Code platform bug with no
cc10x-side workaround available. Tracked: GH #29674, #30296, #30360.
AskUserQuestion in the router will still fail on initial invocation
turn; Empty Answer Guard (auto-proceed) handles this gracefully.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix duplicate graph edges after person merge

mergePerson() rewrites DeducedRelation person IDs but didn't deduplicate,
so merging two people with identical family relations doubled every edge.
Now deduplicates by (personAID, personBID, relationType) after ID rewrite.

GraphBuilderService also deduplicates deduced family edges by canonical
node pair, collapsing parent/child complementary records into one edge.

refactor: 通貨設定と戦略設定を分離

通貨固有データ（symbol, saxo_uic, pip_size等）と戦略設定（thresholds, timeframes, sl_tp）を
別ファイルに分離し、新戦略追加時のファイル増殖を防止。

新構造:
- config/currencies/*.json - 通貨固有データのみ
- config/strategies/<strategy>/defaults.json - 戦略デフォルト設定
- config/strategies/<strategy>/overrides/<SYMBOL>.json - 通貨別オーバーライド
- config/assignments.json - 通貨→戦略マッピング

config.sh に load_merged_config() と get_strategies_for_currency() を追加し、
後方互換性を維持しつつ新構造に対応。

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix triggers not firing: use single Gunicorn worker for APScheduler

Root cause: Gunicorn with --workers 2 forks two processes, each with its
own BackgroundScheduler. A trigger created via the API only registers in
one worker's scheduler, and may never fire if that worker gets recycled.

Changes:
- Procfile: Switch to 1 worker + 4 threads (APScheduler is in-process)
- app.py: Set explicit timezone='UTC' on BackgroundScheduler
- trigger_service.py: Log next_run_time for each synced trigger at startup

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(terraform): resync project state before plan to fix prevent_destroy error

Re-import google_project.integration on each run to ensure state reflects
actual GCP org_id/billing_account values, preventing forced replacement.

commit.message:
Update review skill to support iterative review cycle

The review skill now detects prior review state and acts accordingly:
no comments → first review, unanswered comments → stop, all answered →
verify fixes and either close the bead or articulate remaining issues.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

v0.44.19: Fix Ctrl+Shift+Scroll fine zoom direction

Chrome converts deltaY to deltaX when Shift is held, so deltaY was
always 0 and both scroll directions resolved to zoom out. Now falls
back to deltaX when deltaY is zero.

commit.message:
feat: convert profile creation into multi-step wizard (#72)

* feat: convert profile creation into multi-step wizard

Replace the single-form profile creation page with a 6-step wizard
(personal info, tags, bio, contact, image upload, preview) to improve
the user experience with focused data entry, integrated photo upload,
and a profile preview before going live.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* test: eliminate service-level tests by distributing coverage to component tests

Delete create-profile-wizard.service.spec.ts and redistribute all 19
service tests to their consuming components and a new guard integration
test, per project rule "NEVER write service layer tests".

- create-profile-wizard.spec.ts: use real wizard service, add tests for
  initializeFromMember (pre-fill, idempotency, missing name) and reset
- contact-step.spec.ts: use real wizard service, add tests for
  buildProfileData (required/optional fields, omits empty), completeStep,
  and profileCreated
- preview-step.spec.ts: use real wizard service, verify assembled profile
  data rendering and reset clears all state
- wizard-step.guard.integration.spec.ts (new): integration tests with
  real routing exercising canNavigateToStep, getFirstIncompleteStep, and
  completeStep through navigation behavior

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: resolve lint errors and add wizard cleanup on destroy

Replace for-loops with findIndex/slice+some to satisfy unicorn/no-for-loop,
add eslint-disable for Angular validator null returns (unicorn/no-null),
and register DestroyRef cleanup to reset wizard state when navigating away.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: address PR review findings for profile creation wizard

- Fix double-protocol bug in website URL by normalizing with computed signal
- Fix onFinish() to navigate before resetting wizard state
- Add double-submit guard to ContactStep.onNext()
- Log actual error in slug validator catchError instead of swallowing
- Narrow STEP_ROUTE_MAP to Partial<Record<WizardStep, string>> and log unknown sections
- Extract PersonalInfo and ContactInfo interfaces to wizard-types.ts

commit.message:
fix(marketplace): move recipe data client-side for instant rendering

Instead of fetching recipes from /api/automation/marketplace/recipes,
RECIPES array is now defined in the client. The MarketplaceTab receives
the already-loaded rules list from the parent and computes installed
status locally — no extra API call, no loading flicker, no race condition.

Install/uninstall still persist via the server endpoints.

commit.message:
fix: speed up Settings GUI open time (Refs #105)

Three optimizations:
- Move Ollama start to background thread after window shown (was blocking
  2-15s before window creation)
- Enable persistent WebView2 storage (private_mode=False + storage_path)
  to cache browser environment across launches
- Defer get_available_models() call so form renders without waiting for
  disk I/O on each model

Also fix Playwright GPU dialog overlay blocking tests by adding
dismissGpuDialog() helper to the test fixture.

commit.message:
fix: move API functions to root for Vercel serverless detection

Vercel looks for serverless functions in the root /api directory.
Functions at packages/web/api/ were not detected, causing all API
requests to return the SPA index.html instead of executing handlers.

- Copy api/ directory to project root
- Add @neondatabase/serverless and @vercel/node to root dependencies
- Update rewrite rules to not intercept /api/* routes

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(embed): normalize ?embed=true to minimized mode

The Dlubal website embeds CALC with ?embed=true&lang=en, but our code
expected ?embed=minimized or ?embed=maximized. The value "true" was
treated as an unknown string, bypassing the compact embed layout entirely.

Now any embed value that is not "maximized" is normalized to "minimized".

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat(engine): add performance regression gate, expand inline test suites
across bytecode VM, capability, ESM loader, parallel interference gate,
phase gate, static authority analyzer, threshold signing, and tier-up
profiler modules

New module:
- performance_regression_gate.rs: deterministic performance regression
  gate for RGC-703 (bd-1lsy.8.3) — converts benchmark observations into
  fail-closed promotion verdicts with deterministic culprit ranking and
  waiver-expiry enforcement (1472 lines)
- lib.rs: register performance_regression_gate in module tree

Inline test enrichment (adding comprehensive #[cfg(test)] coverage):

- bytecode_vm.rs (+1701 lines): exhaustive Value truthiness/kind tests,
  Instruction opcode_name coverage for all variants, VM execution paths
  including arithmetic, comparisons, jumps, function calls, closures,
  property access, inline cache behavior, GC root tracing, and register
  allocation edge cases

- capability.rs (+319 lines): enum completeness (all 16 capabilities in
  full profile), RuntimeCapability display uniqueness, profile subset/
  superset relationships, capability grant/revoke round-trips, and
  policy profile composition

- esm_loader.rs (+604 lines): module status display/ordering for all
  variants, ExportEntry constructors, import resolution with bare
  specifiers and cycles, module graph determinism, cache invalidation,
  and evaluation ordering

- parallel_interference_gate.rs (+402 lines): witness comparison with
  isolated field mismatches (chunk_count, boundary_repairs, total_tokens,
  hashes), multi-field diff aggregation, and merge reproducibility

- phase_gate.rs (+353 lines): interleaving zero-surface div-by-zero
  edge cases, threshold boundary tests, gate evaluation with zero/
  nonzero thresholds, and phase transition validation

- static_authority_analyzer.rs (+533 lines): BFS topology with all-dead-
  edge exclusion, path-sensitive analysis, cache coherence, and hostcall
  reachability field tests

- threshold_signing.rs (+359 lines): empty preimage ceremony, k=n with
  missing share failure, ceremony ordering determinism, and scope-
  specific threshold validation

- tier_up_profiler.rs (+392 lines): rustfmt formatting fixes and
  additional profiler eligibility edge cases

Other:
- franken_test262_runner.rs: expanded test262 runner with additional
  ES2020 gate coverage (+70 lines)
- performance_statistical_validation.rs: extended validation pipeline
  with additional statistical checks (+403 lines)
- module_compatibility_matrix.rs: minor additions (+4 lines)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

repository.name: franken_engine
